title: The pipeline of Hi-C assembly
author: Xin Liu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qradv2e
materials: Extract valid pairs reads according the HiC-Pro result.
to prepare data for 3D de novo (v.

steps.title: Get raw Hi-C sequencing data in...
steps.instruction: Get raw Hi-C sequencing data in Fastq format and reference genome(the result of SOAPdenovo2) . Filter the input raw sequences by using HiC-Pro (v. 2.8.0). Using parameters'MIN_INSERT_SIZE = 50 MAX_INSERT_SIZE = 2000',others are default parameters

steps.title: assembly to assemble into chromosome 1-Note
steps.instruction: assembly to assemble into chromosome 1-Note: Using default parameter 2-Note: Using parameter'-m haploid -s 4 -c 21'
